allow: PowerShell(.\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -c "from fast_flights import FlightData, Passengers, Result, get_flights; from datetime import date, timedelta; d = \(date.today\(\)+timedelta\(days=30\)\).isoformat\(\); print\('Searching for', d\); r = get_flights\(flight_data=[FlightData\(date=d, from_airport='MAD', to_airport='BCN'\)], trip='one-way', seat='economy', passengers=Passengers\(adults=1, children=0, infants_in_seat=0, infants_on_lap=0\), fetch_mode='fallback'\); print\('current_price:', r.current_price\); print\('n_flights:', len\(r.flights\)\); print\('first:', r.flights[0] if r.flights else 'NONE'\)" 2>&1)
